channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Announces Visa-Free Travel for 21 African Nations, Boosting Regional Tourism
item.description: Tanzania's Immigration Services Department has released the 2026 visa exemption list, allowing citizens from 21 African countries to enter without a visa. The list includes nations like Kenya, South A...

item.title: Mike Sonko and Obidan Dela Exchange Gifts Ahead of Charity Event
item.description: Kenyan politician Mike Sonko received a surprise visit from comedian Obidan Dela, who gifted him an imported oud perfume ahead of Dela's 'Kenyans for Kenyans' charity event in Eldoret. In return, Sonk...

item.title: Tanzania's Domestic Nickel Processing Strategy for Global Clean Energy Markets
item.description: Tanzania is shifting from raw mineral exports to domestic processing of critical minerals like nickel to become a key player in global clean technology supply chains. The country is investing in refin...

item.title: Australia's AI Data Centre Regulation: Balancing Innovation and Environmental Concerns
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has established the Office of AI within his department to coordinate the development of data centres, critical infrastructure for AI technology. The initiative aims to ...

item.title: AI Tools Enhance Learning Opportunities for Students with Disabilities
item.description: The article highlights how AI-powered tools are transforming education for students with disabilities, using the story of Liam Dansereau, a 13-year-old with cerebral palsy who uses Face control techno...

item.title: She’s Green: A Patience-Driven Approach to Musical Growth
item.description: She’s Green, a Minneapolis-based shoegaze band, is gaining recognition for their deliberate approach to musical development rather than chasing immediate success. Formed during the pandemic, the band ...

item.title: DepEd launches emergency preparedness drills in public schools nationwide
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has initiated nationwide active threat simulation drills in public schools to enhance campus security and emergency preparedness. Education Secretary Sonny Angara l...

item.title: Prosecution calls for disclosure of Sara Duterte and husband's financial records in impeachment case

item.title: Creators Transform Fan Experience at FIFA World Cup
item.description: This year’s FIFA World Cup has seen an unprecedented surge in the influence of content creators, reshaping how fans engage with the tournament. Partnerships between FIFA and platforms like TikTok and ...

item.title: Trump to Address Election Integrity Concerns in Upcoming National Speech

item.title: 2026 World Cup TV Schedule: Full Coverage for UK Viewers
item.description: The article outlines the comprehensive television schedule for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, detailing how UK viewers can access every match live on free-to-air channels BBC and ITV. It highlights that all...

item.title: Security Forces Eliminate Three More Terrorists in Balochistan, Total Reaches 88 in Operation Shaban

item.title: Lagos Floods: Weather Forecast and Urban Challenges
item.description: Lagosians are preparing for heavy rains and flooding as the weather forecast predicts rain almost every day for the next 10 days. The city, which is low-lying and surrounded by water bodies, faces rec...

item.title: Weekly Nuclear News Update: July 15, 2026
item.description: This week's newsletter, posted on July 15, 2026, by Christina Macpherson, focuses on global nuclear issues, including disarmament efforts and environmental concerns. The content highlights a webinar t...

item.title: Woman Impersonated IAS Officer to Marry Man, Demanded ₹40 Lakh Extortion
item.description: A woman in Uttar Pradesh's Bareilly, identified as Sadhana, was arrested after allegedly posing as an IAS officer to marry a man and extort ₹40 lakh. The incident unfolded when Sadhana used fake socia...

item.title: Teen accused of killing elderly neighbor faces court review amid mental health concerns
item.description: A 14-year-old boy is facing a court review after stabbing his elderly neighbor, Eleanor Doney, to death in what prosecutors described as a premeditated act. The case has drawn attention due to the you...

item.title: Defense argues Duterte's financial records subpoena is part of a broader investigation

item.title: South African Police Investigate Murder of March and March Gauteng Leader
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has launched a multidisciplinary investigation into the fatal shooting of Andile Mvuyiselwa Somgaxa, the leader of March and March in Gauteng. Somgaxa was shot ...
